channel.title: SciML Daily
channel.description: New papers in Scientific ML, AI for Scientific Computing & Applied Math — every morning.

item.title: The Coercivity Gap in Neural PDE Solvers: Parameter Escape and Functional Convergence
item.description: Analyses neural PDE solvers from a variational perspective, studying coercivity and convergence. (tags: physics-informed-ml, foundations)

item.title: Reduced order modeling for spatio-temporal pattern approximation in diffusive Lotka-Volterra equations
item.description: Applies proper orthogonal decomposition and tensorial POD for reduced order modeling of diffusive Lotka-Volterra equations. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Inverse Critical Experiment Design via Gradient Optimization and a Multigroup Attention-Based Neural Network Architecture
item.description: Proposes a deep learning surrogate and gradient optimization for inverse design of critical experiments in nuclear engineering. (tags: ml-numerical-methods, foundations)

item.title: Boundary-compatible interacting approximations of quasilinear PDEs on bounded domains
item.description: Develops a general operator-theoretic framework for constructing interacting approximations of quasilinear PDEs with boundary conditions. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Stein Kernelized Molecular Dynamics for Active Learning of Interatomic Potentials
item.description: Proposes Stein kernelized molecular dynamics for active learning of interatomic potentials, combining enhanced sampling with ML. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Building The Ph(ysical)AI Layer Of Machine Intelligence
item.description: Proposes principle-driven foundation models that encode signal-theoretic principles for cross-modal transfer. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Semantic Constraint Synthesis for Adaptive Trajectory Optimization via Large Language Models
item.description: Uses LLMs to translate natural language mission requirements into trajectory optimization code. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Physics-Informed Machine Learning for Short-Term Flood Prediction
item.description: Proposes a physics-informed machine learning framework for flood prediction incorporating hydrological knowledge. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Nonlocal Mean Field Schr\"{o}dinger Bridge with Learned Interactions
item.description: Uses neural network surrogates to approximate nonlocal interactions in mean-field Schrödinger bridge, reducing cost from quadratic to linear. (tags: foundations, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Characterizing initial human-AI proof formalization workflows
item.description: Investigates human-AI workflows for proof formalization, a scientific computing task. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: From Ticks to Flows: Dynamics of Neural Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Environments
item.description: Presents a continuous-time framework for neural RL dynamics using stochastic differential equations, contributing to the mathematical theory of neural networks. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Derivative Informed Learning of Exchange-Correlation Functionals
item.description: Introduces derivative-informed loss for training ML exchange-correlation functionals, improving accuracy and reducing SCF iterations. (tags: foundations, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Neural Galerkin Normalizing Flows for Bayesian Inference of Diffusions with Inaccessible Boundaries
item.description: Proposes neural Galerkin normalizing flows to approximate transition densities for diffusions, enabling efficient Bayesian inference. (tags: uq-inverse-problems, ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: A Geometric Characterization of the Stationary Plateau for Two-Layer Neural Networks
item.description: Provides geometric characterization of stationary plateaus in two-layer neural networks, contributing to the mathematical theory of deep learning. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Policy Gradient for Continuous-Time Robust Markov Decision Processes
item.description: Develops policy gradient algorithms for continuous-time robust MDPs with convergence guarantees. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Deliberate Evolution: Agentic Reasoning for Sample-Efficient Symbolic Regression with LLMs
item.description: Uses LLM agents for symbolic regression, a core equation-discovery task in scientific computing. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems, llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: MeshTok: Efficient Multi-Scale Tokenization for Scalable PDE Transformers
item.description: Proposes an adaptive multiscale tokenization method for PDE transformers, advancing neural PDE modeling. (tags: operator-learning)

item.title: Shortcomings and capacities of real-constrained neural networks in complex spaces
item.description: Provides mathematical analysis of neural network storage capacity using Gardner volume comparisons and HCIZ formula. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Physics-Informed Neural Network Modeling of Biodegradable Contaminant Transport through GCL/SL Composite Liners
item.description: Applies physics-informed neural networks to contaminant transport modeling, a physics-informed ML method. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Input-to-State Stable Bundle Koopman Neural ODEs for Learning Controlled Dynamics under Environmental Constraints
item.description: Integrates Koopman operator identification with Neural ODEs and fiber bundle geometry for controlled dynamics. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: Low-Rank Decay for Grokking in Scale-Invariant Transformers: A Spectral-Geometric View
item.description: Studies spectral regularization and grokking in transformers from a spectral-geometric perspective. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Loss-Conditional PINNs for Parametric PDE Families
item.description: Extends PINNs to parametric PDE families with loss-conditional training, a physics-informed ML method. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Flatness and Generalization: Learning Multi-Index Models with Homogeneous Neural Networks
item.description: Theoretical analysis of flatness and generalization in homogeneous neural networks; a mathematical analysis of neural networks. (tags: foundations)

item.title: ATLAS-NN: Adaptive Transfer Learnable Symplectic-aware Neural Network for Long-Time Hamiltonian Dynamics
item.description: Proposes Hamiltonian neural networks with adaptive time scaling for long-time dynamics, an equation-discovery method. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: ParetoPilot: Zero-Surrogate Offline Multi-Objective Optimization via Infer-Perturb-Guide Diffusion
item.description: Offline multi-objective optimization with diffusion models; ML for optimization, a scientific computing technique. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: When Both Layers Learn: Training Dynamics of Representing Linear Models via ReLU Networks
item.description: Provides a theoretical analysis of gradient descent dynamics for ReLU networks, fitting the mathematical analysis of neural networks category. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Simulate, Reason, Decide: Scientific Reasoning with LLMs for Simulation-Driven Decision Making
item.description: Introduces a neuro-symbolic framework for LLM agents to reason about scientific simulators, fitting the LLM agents for scientific computing category. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Reconstructing Unobservable Temperature Fields via Simulation-Aided Intelligent Sensing
item.description: Uses a neural network trained on synthetic simulation data to reconstruct temperature fields from sparse sensors, addressing an inverse problem. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Curvature-aware dynamic precision approach for physics-informed neural networks
item.description: Proposes a curvature-aware precision controller for physics-informed neural networks. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: Beyond Structural Symmetries: Linear Mode Connectivity via Neuron Identifiability
item.description: Theoretical analysis of neural network symmetries and linear mode connectivity with mathematical rigor. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Activation Steering of Video Generation Models via Reduced-Order Linear Optimal Control
item.description: Applies reduced-order linear optimal control to activation steering of generative models. (tags: foundations)

item.title: The Right Measure for Physics-Constrained Generation: A Co-Area Correction for Posterior-Consistent PDE Inverse Problems
item.description: Proposes a measure-aware constrained sampler for generative models in PDE inverse problems. (tags: generative-simulation, uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: Beyond Objective Equivalence: Constraint Injection for LLM-Based Optimization Modeling on Vehicle Routing Problems
item.description: Uses LLMs for generating optimization solver code with a novel verifier method for constraint adherence. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: Optimizing the Cost-Quality Tradeoff of Agentic Theorem Provers in Lean
item.description: Agentic theorem proving in Lean with cost-quality optimization; in scope for LLM agents for math. (tags: llm-agents-for-sci-computing)

item.title: AdaKoop: Efficient Modeling of Nonlinear Dynamics from Nonstationary Data Streams with Koopman Operator Regression
item.description: Koopman operator regression for nonlinear dynamics; in scope for dynamical systems and equation discovery. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: In-Context Graphical Inference
item.description: Introduces a Graph Transformer with Tensor-Train compression for marginal inference in graphical models, a core applied math task. (tags: foundations)

item.title: Learning Control-Affine Reduced-Order Models via Autoencoders
item.description: Uses autoencoders to learn control-affine reduced-order models for dynamical systems. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)

item.title: Deep Embedded Multiplicative DMD for Algebra-Preserving Koopman Learning
item.description: Combines deep learning with Koopman theory for algebra-preserving discovery of nonlinear dynamics. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems, operator-learning)

item.title: Phase transitions for the noisy transformer model in arbitrary dimension
item.description: Mathematical analysis of the noisy transformer model using statistical physics and PDE methods. (tags: mathematical-analysis-of-llm)

item.title: Generalized Forcing Method: Generation of Diverse Data for Training Linear Transport PDE Closure Models
item.description: Develops a data-generation framework for training closure models in linear transport PDEs. (tags: equation-discovery-dynamical-systems)

item.title: DiffAero: A GPU-Accelerated Differentiable Simulation Framework for Efficient Quadrotor Policy Learning
item.description: Introduces a GPU-accelerated differentiable simulation framework for quadrotor policy learning, a core differentiable physics method. (tags: differentiable-simulation)

item.title: SPLIT-PINN: Separable Probability Learning Technique via Physics-Informed Neural Networks for High-Dimensional Probabilistic Modeling
item.description: Develops a separable probability learning technique using PINNs for high-dimensional probabilistic modeling of material behavior. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: SC-TauPath: A Structural Connectivity Attribution Framework for Mapping Tau Propagation Pathways in Alzheimer's Disease
item.description: Combines a Network Diffusion Model with an MLP for tau propagation pathway mapping, integrating physics-based modeling with ML. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: The Differentiable Auditory Loop (DAL): An ML Framework for Hyper-Personalized Hearing Aids
item.description: Introduces a differentiable auditory model for personalized hearing aid design, leveraging differentiable programming and gradient descent. (tags: differentiable-simulation)

item.title: A Systematic Benchmark of Physics-Informed Neural Network Architectures for the Stiff Poisson-Nernst-Planck System: Adaptive LossWeighting and Multi-Scale Resolution
item.description: Systematic benchmark of PINN architectures for a stiff PDE system, evaluating physics-informed machine learning methods. (tags: physics-informed-ml)

item.title: CaloTrilogy: Toward a Breakthrough in One-Step, End-to-End, Physics-Guided Shower Generation for Modern Calorimeters
item.description: Develops a physics-guided generative model for calorimeter shower generation using flow matching/diffusion. (tags: generative-simulation)

item.title: L-TGVN: Leveraging Longitudinal Priors for Personalized Rapid MRI
item.description: Proposes a trust-guided variational network for longitudinal MRI reconstruction, a learned inverse problem method. (tags: uq-inverse-problems)

item.title: U-Net-Accelerated Quality-Diversity Optimization for Climate-Adaptive Urban Layouts
item.description: Uses a U-Net surrogate to accelerate physics-based simulation for urban layout optimization. (tags: ml-numerical-methods)
